response.overview: Trey Harrison is an up-and-coming internet star who has built his career on exposing cheaters in orchestrated sting operations, successfully turning heartbreak into a viral spectacle. But when two former participants are found murdered, Trey's sensational digital world begins to crumble, and the onscreen drama escalates into a lethal real-world nightmare.
response.tagline: Fame has a price. Betrayal has a body count.
response.title: The Loyalty Test
